# MathQuill component

This is a custom component to support WYSIWYG math entry (like Desmos) using [MathQuill](http://mathquill.com/).

MathQuill is licensed under the [MPL 2.0 license](https://github.com/mathquill/mathquill/blob/master/LICENSE).

The Symbola font was originally made by George Douros and is licensed under the [UFAS license](https://github.com/ChiefMikeK/ttf-symbola/blob/master/UFAS-LICENSE.pdf). It has been hosted in this repository under the `vendor/font/` folder but is subject to its original license.
